case_title: LAUCHLIN OSULLIVAN VS. SARA TEEL et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TEEL, SARA VARGAS, MARCELO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSULLIVAN, LAUCHLIN AS TO DEFENDANT TEEL, SARA VARGAS, MARCELO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,653.36 FILED BY OSULLIVAN, LAUCHLIN AS TO DEFENDANT TEEL, SARA VARGAS, MARCELO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-13-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TEEL, SARA VARGAS, MARCELO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT--MARCELO VARGAS, WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSULLIVAN, LAUCHLIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEEL, SARA VARGAS, MARCELO $1,826.68 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,886.68, PLAINTIFF IS 50% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE INJURIES TO HIS DOG, SEBASTIAN AS PLAINTIFF ADMITTED HIS DOG TO RUN OFF LEASH IN AN AREA DESIGNED FOR LARGE DOGS RATHER THE APPROPRIATE SECURE AREA DESIGNATED FOR OFF LEASE SMALL DOGS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
